CVRD_DAYS_IP_PSYCH_OVER_65 
LABEL: 
Count of Medicaid Covered Days in an Inpatient Psychiatric Facility (IPF); Beneficiary Over 65 Years 
DESCRIPTION: The number of inpatient psychiatric days covered by Medicaid on this claim.
